content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be augmented by repurposing the intrinsic reward signals from curiosity-driven RL methods (ICM/RND) to prioritize which new experiences the agent encodes into long-term episodic memory, rather than using traditional uncertainty-based acquisition alone. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where agents actively seek out surprising, unpredicted experiences to add to memory, which in turn improves their future planning and predictive accuracy.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
